title: BRIGHT & HOMELY PACKING TAPE SUPER CLEAR 48MM X 80M 6 PACK - Clear Packing Tape - Low Noise - Packing Tape For Packing Boxes - Parcel tape - Heavy Duty Tape - Heavy Duty Tape Rolls
features: PACK CONTENTS: Set of 6 super clear parcel tapes, each roll measuring 48mm in width and 80m in length for all your packaging needs
SUPERIOR CLARITY: Crystal clear tape provides excellent visibility, making labels and packaging contents easily readable through the tape
VERSATILE USE: Perfect for sealing parcels, boxes, envelopes and general packaging requirements in both home and office settings
GENEROUS LENGTH: Each roll provides 80 metres of tape, offering excellent value and ensuring you have plenty for multiple packaging tasks
STANDARD WIDTH: 48mm wide tape provides optimal coverage for most packaging applications, making it ideal for sealing medium to large boxes
description: Keep your parcels securely sealed with this premium 6-pack of Super Clear parcel tape from Bright & Homely. Each roll measures a generous 48mm in width and 80m in length, providing ample tape for all your packaging needs. The crystal-clear transparency ensures your package labels and contents remain visible, while the strong adhesive maintains a reliable seal during transit and storage. Perfect for home use, office shipping, or small business needs, this multi-pack offers excellent value and convenience. The standard width makes it compatible with most tape dispensers, allowing for smooth and efficient application. Whether you're moving house, sending gifts, or managing business shipments, this parcel tape delivers professional-quality results every time. The durable construction helps protect your packages from dust and moisture during handling and transportation.
